Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_list_instances","arguments":{}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 15 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"panes_info = []\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    panes_info.append\({\\"id\\": p.id, \\"type\\": str\(p.type\), \\"ratio\\": p.ratio, \\"name\\": getattr\(p, \\"name\\", None\), \\"owner\\": p.owner.path if p.owner else None}\)\\nprint\(panes_info\)\\nprint\(\\"top_store\\", op\(\\"/ui\\"\).fetch\(\\"cf_top_pane_id\\", -1\)\)\\nprint\(\\"bottom_store\\", op\(\\"/ui\\"\).fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"for p in ui.panes:\\n    print\(p.id, p.name, p.type, \\"ratio=\\", p.ratio, \\"owner=\\", p.owner.path\)\\nprint\(\\"top_store\\", op\(\\"/ui\\"\).fetch\(\\"cf_top_pane_id\\", -1\)\)\\nprint\(\\"bottom_store\\", op\(\\"/ui\\"\).fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"for p in ui.panes:\\n    print\(p.id, p.name, p.type, \\"ratio=\\", p.ratio, \\"owner=\\", p.owner.path, \\"link=\\", getattr\(p, \\"link\\", None\)\)\\nprint\(\\"top_store\\", op\(\\"/ui\\"\).fetch\(\\"cf_top_pane_id\\", -1\)\)\\nprint\(\\"bottom_store\\", op\(\\"/ui\\"\).fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":6,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# pane1 = NetworkEditor visually top, pane2 = Panel visually bottom\\np1 = [p for p in ui.panes if p.id==0][0]\\np2 = [p for p in ui.panes if p.id==1][0]\\nprint\(\\"BEFORE p1.ratio=\\", p1.ratio, \\"p2.ratio=\\", p2.ratio\)\\np1.ratio = 0.0001\\nprint\(\\"AFTER set p1=0.0001 -> p1.ratio=\\", p1.ratio, \\"p2.ratio=\\", p2.ratio\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":7,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Verify store keys point to the correct visual panes\\nui_root = op\(\\"/ui\\"\)\\ntop_id = ui_root.fetch\(\\"cf_top_pane_id\\", -1\)\\nbot_id = ui_root.fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\\nprint\(\\"top_store_id=\\", top_id, \\"bot_store_id=\\", bot_id\)\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    role = \\"TOP\\" if p.id==top_id else \(\\"BOTTOM\\" if p.id==bot_id else \\"?\\"\)\\n    print\(role, p.id, p.name, p.type, \\"ratio=\\", round\(p.ratio,4\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":8,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Simulate drag: change bottom pane ratio to 0.5\\nui_root = op\(\\"/ui\\"\)\\nbot_id = ui_root.fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\\nbot = [p for p in ui.panes if p.id==bot_id][0]\\nbot.ratio = 0.5\\nprint\(\\"after drag: bot.ratio=\\", round\(bot.ratio,4\)\)\\n\\n# Enforce lock \(the lock_pane_ratio logic\)\\nLOCK_RATIO = 0.9999\\nif bot.ratio != LOCK_RATIO:\\n    bot.ratio = LOCK_RATIO\\nprint\(\\"after enforce: bot.ratio=\\", round\(bot.ratio,4\)\)\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    print\(\\"  pane\\", p.id, \\"ratio=\\", round\(p.ratio,4\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":9,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"ui_root = op\(\\"/ui\\"\)\\nbot_id = ui_root.fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\\nbot = None\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    if p.id == bot_id:\\n        bot = p\\n        break\\nbot.ratio = 0.5\\nprint\(\\"after drag: bot.ratio=\\", round\(bot.ratio,4\)\)\\nLOCK_RATIO = 0.9999\\nif bot.ratio != LOCK_RATIO:\\n    bot.ratio = LOCK_RATIO\\nprint\(\\"after enforce: bot.ratio=\\", round\(bot.ratio,4\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":10,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"cf = op\(\\"/ui/Custom_families\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"cf=\\", cf\)\\nif cf:\\n    rt = cf.op\(\\"Runtime\\"\)\\n    print\(\\"Runtime=\\", rt, \\"allowCooking=\\", rt.allowCooking if rt else None\)\\n    if rt:\\n        for c in rt.children:\\n            print\(\\" \\", c.name, c.type, \\"file=\\", getattr\(c.par, \\"file\\", None\).eval\(\) if hasattr\(c.par,\\"file\\"\) else None, \\"active=\\", getattr\(c.par, \\"active\\", None\).eval\(\) if hasattr\(c.par,\\"active\\"\) else None\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":11,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"rt = op\(\\"/ui/Custom_families/Runtime\\"\)\\nrt.allowCooking = True\\nprint\(\\"runtime allowCooking=\\", rt.allowCooking\)\\n# Manually break ratio and wait one frame to see if onFrameStart restores it\\nui_root = op\(\\"/ui\\"\)\\nbot_id = ui_root.fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\\nbot = None\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    if p.id == bot_id:\\n        bot = p\\n        break\\nbot.ratio = 0.4\\nprint\(\\"injected drag: bot.ratio=\\", round\(bot.ratio,4\)\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":12,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Read state after a few frames have passed \(should be auto-restored by onFrameStart\)\\nui_root = op\(\\"/ui\\"\)\\nbot_id = ui_root.fetch\(\\"cf_bottom_pane_id\\", -1\)\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    if p.id == bot_id:\\n        print\(\\"bot.ratio=\\", round\(p.ratio,4\)\)\\n# Also check the DAT for errors\\ndat = op\(\\"/ui/Custom_families/Runtime/lock_pane_ratio\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"dat errors:\\", dat.errors\(\) if dat else \\"missing\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"dat warnings:\\", dat.warnings\(\) if dat else \\"\\"\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":13,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Pre-state\\nprint\(\\"Watcher in /ui:\\", op\(\\"/ui/Watcher_Custom_families\\"\)\)\\np1 = op\(\\"/ui/panes/panebar/pane1\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"pane1 children:\\", [c.name for c in p1.children] if p1 else None\)\\nmenu_op = op\(\\"/ui/dialogs/menu_op\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"menu_op Pages:\\", menu_op.op\(\\"Pages\\"\) if menu_op else None\)\\nprint\(\\"menu_op Page_number:\\", menu_op.op\(\\"Page_number\\"\) if menu_op else None\)\\nprint\(\\"cf source ops:\\"\)\\ncf = op\(\\"/ui/Custom_families\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"  Watcher source:\\", cf.op\(\\"Ui_inject/Watcher_Custom_families\\"\) if cf else None\)\\nprint\(\\"  Pages source:\\", cf.op\(\\"Dialogs/Pages\\"\) if cf else None\)\\nprint\(\\"  Page_number source:\\", cf.op\(\\"Dialogs/Page_number\\"\) if cf else None\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":14,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Test Watcher install\\nui_root = op\(\\"/ui\\"\)\\ncf = op\(\\"/ui/Custom_families\\"\)\\nsrc = cf.op\(\\"Ui_inject/Watcher_Custom_families\\"\)\\nexisting = ui_root.op\(\\"Watcher_Custom_families\\"\)\\nif existing:\\n    existing.destroy\(\)\\nnew = ui_root.copy\(src\)\\nnew.name = \\"Watcher_Custom_families\\"\\nprint\(\\"installed Watcher:\\", new.path\)\\n\\n# Test clear_pane1\\np1 = op\(\\"/ui/panes/panebar/pane1\\"\)\\nKEEP = \(\\"local\\", \\"emptypanel\\"\)\\ndestroyed = []\\nfor child in list\(p1.children\):\\n    if child.name in KEEP:\\n        continue\\n    destroyed.append\(child.name\)\\n    child.destroy\(\)\\nprint\(\\"destroyed from pane1:\\", len\(destroyed\), \\"items\\"\)\\nprint\(\\"pane1 remaining:\\", [c.name for c in p1.children]\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":15,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# List all panebar templates\\npb = op\(\\"/ui/panes/panebar\\"\)\\nif pb:\\n    for c in pb.children:\\n        print\(c.name, c.path, \\"children=\\", len\(c.children\)\)\\nelse:\\n    print\(\\"no /ui/panes/panebar\\"\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":16,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Check panebar template state and which pane each goes with\\nfor t in [\\"pane1\\",\\"pane2\\",\\"pane3\\"]:\\n    pb = op\(f\\"/ui/panes/panebar/{t}\\"\)\\n    if pb:\\n        names = [c.name for c in pb.children]\\n        print\(t, \\"children count=\\", len\(names\), \\"sample=\\", names[:6]\)\\n# Also check pane attributes for hints\\nprint\(\\"---\\"\)\\nfor p in ui.panes:\\n    print\(\\"pane_id=\\", p.id, \\"name=\\", p.name, \\"type=\\", p.type\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":17,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Check pane attributes for panebar binding\\np = ui.panes[0]\\nattrs = [a for a in dir\(p\) if not a.startswith\(\\"_\\"\)]\\nprint\([a for a in attrs if \\"bar\\" in a.lower\(\) or \\"panel\\" in a.lower\(\) or \\"comp\\" in a.lower\(\) or \\"template\\" in a.lower\(\)]\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":18,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Mark each panebar template with a unique node so we can identify which is shown\\nfor i, name in enumerate\([\\"pane1\\",\\"pane2\\",\\"pane3\\"]\):\\n    pb = op\(f\\"/ui/panes/panebar/{name}\\"\)\\n    if pb:\\n        # rename text1 to mark\\n        marker = pb.op\(\\"text1\\"\)\\n        if marker:\\n            print\(name, \\"text1 textWidth=\\", marker.par.text.eval\(\) if hasattr\(marker.par,\\"text\\"\) else \\"n/a\\"\)\\n# Now splitTop and inspect\\nbefore_panes = [\(p.id, p.name\) for p in ui.panes]\\nprint\(\\"before split:\\", before_panes\)\\nnew = ui.panes[0].splitTop\(\)\\nafter_panes = [\(p.id, p.name, p.type, round\(p.ratio,4\)\) for p in ui.panes]\\nprint\(\\"after split:\\", after_panes\)\\nprint\(\\"returned new pane: id=\\", new.id, \\"name=\\", new.name\)"}}}')

Bash(curl -s -m 10 -X POST http://localhost:40404/mcp -H "Content-Type: application/json" -H "Accept: application/json, text/event-stream" -d '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":19,"method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"td_execute_python","arguments":{"code":"# Close split first\\nwhile len\(ui.panes\) > 1:\\n    ui.panes[1].close\(\)\\nprint\(\\"after close, panes=\\", [\(p.id, p.name\) for p in ui.panes]\)\\n\\n# Mark each template with a colored Constant TOP\\nfor i, name in enumerate\([\\"pane1\\",\\"pane2\\",\\"pane3\\"]\):\\n    pb = op\(f\\"/ui/panes/panebar/{name}\\"\)\\n    if pb is None:\\n        continue\\n    # add marker\\n    existing = pb.op\(\\"_marker\\"\)\\n    if existing:\\n        existing.destroy\(\)\\n    m = pb.create\(textTOP, \\"_marker\\"\)\\n    m.par.text = f\\"TEMPLATE={name}\\"\\n    m.par.fontsizex = 50\\n    m.par.bgcolorr = 1.0 if name==\\"pane1\\" else 0\\n    m.par.bgcolorg = 1.0 if name==\\"pane2\\" else 0\\n    m.par.bgcolorb = 1.0 if name==\\"pane3\\" else 0\\n    m.viewer = True\\nprint\(\\"markers placed\\"\)"}}}')
